titleStmt.title: SII 26.467: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 467. (A.R. No. 444 of 1909.) MAṆAPPAḌIVĪḌU, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Kollam 719 or 711 Kārttigai 13, śu. 10, Tuesday, Uttirāḍam Irregular = 1544-45 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of paddy and other articles monthly, for worship and offering to the temples of the gods Kāṇaviniyaperumāṉ, Mūṉṟīchchuramuḍaiyanayiṉār, Emmaṇḍalaṅkoṇḍa Pāṇḍīchchuramuḍaiyanāyiṉār and Chēravaṉ-uganda-Pānḍīchchuramuḍaiya-nāyinār at Ambalattāḍi-nallūr alias Maṇappaḍaivīḍu in the eastern quarter of Śīvalavaṉmaṅgalam by the chief of Jeyatuṅga-nāḍu, who was called Veṉṟum maṇkoṇḍa Śrī-bhūtala •• vīravaṉmar, who had the title of Śaṅkaranārāyana-Mūttavēḷaikkāṟaṉ � Je[ya]tuṅga-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . Aruḷicceyal kollam
7 10 13 varuṣam kārttikai mātam 13 nāḷ pūrvvapakṣattu decamiyum maṅ
kalavāramum Uttirāṭamum viyākata yokamum varāka
karaṇamum peṟṟa nāṭ cetuṅkanāṭṭuc caṅkaranārāyaṇa
mūttaveḷaikkāṟaṉ veṉṟum maṇkoṇṭa śrī pūtala viravaṉmar Oṉṟu peruṭaiya ceytuṅkanāṭṭu muttavarāy nām
civalavaṉmaṅkalam kiḻpiṭākai Ampalattāṭinallūrāṉa maṇappaṭaivīṭṭil yīccuraṉ pāṭakaṉukku nayiṉār kāṇaviniya
perumāṉ koyilukku cipaṇṭārakkaṇakku nām kāṇiyāṭccaiyāka kaṟpikkaiyil mātam Oṉṟukku koṭṭai mukkā
lum nāḷ Oṉṟukku picaram muvuḻakkum nayiṉār muṉṟīccuramuṭaiya nayiṉār koyilukku mātam Oṉṟukku koṭṭai mukkā
lum nāḷ Oṉṟukkuc coṟu muvuḻakku nayiṉār Emmaṇṭalaṅkoṇṭapāṇṭiccuramuṭaiya nayiṉār koyilukku mātam Oṉṟu
kku koṭṭai muṉṟumāmukkāṇiyum kiḻaippāṭṭām nayiṉār ceravaṉ Ukanta pāṇṭīccuramuṭaiya nayiṉār koyilu
kku mātam Oṉṟukku koṭṭai Araikkālum ĀkaIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.467 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
